expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: final quality pass preserves layering and executable wording
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly states the case focus and checks both components: “This benchmark’s Phase 6 focus— a final quality pass that preserves canonical layering and executable wording— is explicitly and correctly covered …” and includes dedicated sections “Layering preservation: canonical 6-layer structure is required” and “Executable wording: atomic steps and executable-step validation are enforced.”

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase6
expectations.evidence: result.md section “Phase alignment: output is Phase 6–scoped and Phase 6–gated” says it “Meets expectation that the output aligns with primary phase: phase6” and cites Phase 6-specific outputs and gates (e.g., “drafts/qa_plan_phase6_r<round>.md”, “context/quality_delta_<feature-id>.md”, and Phase 6 “--post” validation requirements).
